summary: Read-only comparison of P0-05B Route/Evidence/Owner Mutation Gate and P0-06 Evidence Lineage Closure against current DinoBrain v2.2.1. Found both are partial only: current code has prompt-risk gates, review-first candidates, lifecycle/provenance repair, source chunks/provenance, graph health, and RAG proof/eval, but lacks the plan-required route/evidence/owner mutation ledger/gate packets, final-readiness mutation authorization checks, source-lineage claim coverage report, wiki-claims index, provenance reconcile artifacts, lineage repair queue, Korean visible status fields, and the named smoke tests/contracts.
decisions: Classified P0-05B as partial: existing os_gate/review/lifecycle/sync policy are narrower than the required per-mutation class route/evidence/owner gate.
Classified P0-06 as partial: existing source chunk/provenance and graph-health checks do not implement claim coverage closure, high-confidence promotion blocking, or content-bearing lineage proof.
Did not run mutation/provenance tests because the plan-named tests are absent and the request was read-only/no edits.
next_steps: Implement routing_owner_ledger.json, node-lifecycle-gate-packets.jsonl, node-settlement-lifecycle.json and their final-readiness/Korean UI blockers.
Implement source-lineage-report, node-source-provenance-reconcile validator/planner, wiki-claims index, lineage repair queue, and docs/contracts/evidence-lineage.md.

Add the missing smoke tests: routing-owner-ledger, steward-routing-contract, node-lifecycle-compounding, source-lineage-report, and node-source-provenance-reconcile, including negative raw-source-only fixtures.
search_queries: P0-05B P0-06 routing_owner source-lineage current DinoBrain
